variants: Rhiannon Tegas has been at the forefront of alchemical research, holding an Arctic Alchemist License that signifies her commitment to the discipline. Under the mentorship of Astrid Leclercq, Rhiannon has developed her skills and research capabilities significantly. She has been able to expand her studies thanks to generous funding from Chalice Grove Grants. Her groundbreaking work has appeared in Charcoal Lattice Publishing, where she contributes meaningful insights to the field. Rhiannon is also dedicated to the community, serving as a Steward of Rainwatchers Network, where she promotes environmental sustainability and awareness.
